versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   nirmata-kyverno-3-3-13          true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: nirmata
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: nirmata-kyverno-3-3-13
      name: nirmata-kyverno
      namespace: nirmata

prerequisitesHtml:
Prerequisites

- k0rdent Enterprise - Nirmata license/entitlement for Kyverno
